questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = '34637587-e154-4df8-bbd9-c710c47db14b' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = '431aa5b1-19ac-4adc-816b-f09760a7b7cc'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = '34637587-e154-4df8-bbd9-c710c47db14b'; delete from question_items where id = '34637587-e154-4df8-bbd9-c710c47db14b';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
